items.caption: A four-panel comic strip featuring a character with exaggerated facial expressions and text bubbles. in the first panel, the character is happy and says, "german me, just turned 16." in the second panel, the character is excited and says, "finally i can buy alcohol on my own!" in the third panel, the character is disappointed and says, "she didn't id me." in the fourth panel, the character is surprised and says, "wait... she didn't id me?" the comic strip is humorous and relatable, especially for those who have experienced similar situations.
